positive: A whimsical, storybook illustration of a grumpy badger wearing a tiny smoking jacket, sitting in a cozy armchair by a window, reading a book. Warm, inviting, storybook style, deep shadows, detailed linework, reminiscent of Beatrix Potter meets modern cartooning.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, abstract, sci-fi, digital noise
